child_geo_events.name: Evacuation Shelter - Window Rock Fighting Scouts Event Center

data.information:
Shelter for evacuees are open at the Window Rock Fighting Scouts Event Center, located in Fort Defiance, Arizona. This location will be the primary emergency evacuation shelter for the Oak Ridge Fire evacuees.

Per Navajo Police Department on Facebook.

child_geo_events.address: Dean C. Jackson Memorial Arena, St Michaels, AZ 86511, USA
child_geo_events.name: Large Animal Shelter - Dean C. Jackson Memorial Arena

data.information:
The Navajo Nation Fair Grounds Dean Jackson Arena is available for evacuated livestock. Call (928) 270-8062 or (928) 270-2254 to coordinate drop off.

Per Navajo Police Department on Facebook.

child_geo_events.address: East side of the Ganado Unified School District campus, next to “G” Hill
child_geo_events.name: Evacuation Shelter - Ganado Fieldhouse

data.information:
The Ganado Fieldhouse is the shelter for impacted residents evacuating from Klagetoh.

The Unified Command Team, in coordination with the Oak Ridge Fire Incident Command Post, recommends that residents of the Klagetoh Community—specifically Zones 1, 6, 7, and 8—evacuate to the Ganado Fieldhouse.

Shelter Details:

Availability: Open 24/7 for occupants

Facilities: Restrooms, showers, snacks, and drinks

Cots are available at the Ganado Fieldhouse

Location: East side of the Ganado Unified School District campus, next to “G” Hill.

Intake Number: 928-349-0815 (24/7)

Per Navajo Department of Emergency Management on Facebook.
